targets.query:
SELECT *
FROM "mixingTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "mtNo" = '${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND time > now() - 12h
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT "tsc_current", "tsc_min", "tsc_max"
FROM "mixingTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "mtNo" = '${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND $timeFilter
ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT mean("value") FROM "measurement" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT "ph_current", "ph_min", "ph_max"
FROM "mixingTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "mtNo" = '${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND $timeFilter
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT "level"
FROM "mixingTankStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "mtNo" = '${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND time > now() - 30d
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT LAST("tsc_current") AS "tsc_current",
LAST("tsc_min") AS "tsc_min",
LAST("tsc_max") AS "tsc_max",
LAST("ph_current") AS "ph_current",
LAST("ph_min") AS "ph_min",
LAST("ph_max") AS "ph_max",
LAST("source_time") AS "source_time"
FROM "mixingTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "mtNo" = '${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND time > now() - 30d
GROUP BY "batchNo", "latexType"

SELECT "ph_current", "ph_min", "ph_max"
FROM "mixingTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "mtNo" = '${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND time > now() - 30d
GROUP BY "batchNo"
ORDER BY time  ASC

SELECT "tsc_current", "tsc_min", "tsc_max"
FROM "mixingTankStatusDetailed"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "mtNo" = '${tankNo}${tankSuffix}'
AND time > now() - 30d
GROUP BY "batchNo"
ORDER BY time  ASC

SELECT 
  "batchOrderNo",
  "currentStage",
  "stabilizerMin",
  "phAdjustmentMin",
  "compositeMin",
  "esdMin",
  "phDilutionMin",
  "waxMin",
  "stabilizerStart",
  "stabilizerEnd",
  "compositeStart",
  "compositeEnd",
  "esdStart",
  "esdEnd",
  "waxStart",
  "waxEnd",
  "updatedAt",
  "tankNo",
  "plant"
FROM "accs_batch_display"
WHERE "plant" = 'Plant ${plantNo}'
AND time > now() - 30d
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 500

list.definition:
SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "mixingTankStatusMain"
WITH KEY = "mtNo"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
list.label: Tank
list.name: tankNo

query.query:
SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "mixingTankStatusMain"
WITH KEY = "mtNo"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
